# Greenheck — Exhaust Ventilation for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## SBE Series (Roof-Mount Centrifugal Exhaust)

| Model | CFM Range | Motor HP | Sound (sone) | Weight | Est. Price |
|-------|----------|----------|-------------|--------|------------|
| SBE-200 | 800-3,500 | 0.25-1.0 | 3-12 | 85 lbs | — |
| SBE-300 | 1,500-6,000 | 0.5-2.0 | 5-18 | 125 lbs | $1,200-2,500 |
| SBE-400 | 3,000-10,000 | 1.0-3.0 | 8-25 | 175 lbs | — |

## Container Application
- Mount on reinforced roof section (welded structural pad)
- Pair with EAD motorized damper for fire suppression integration
- Damper ties to ANSUL AUTOPULSE — closes on Novec discharge
- VFD-compatible motors for variable airflow
- Backdraft damper prevents reverse airflow when off

## Alternatives
- CUE (Centrifugal Upblast) — heavier duty, higher static pressure
- CSP (Centrifugal Sidewall) — if no roof penetration
- G/GP (Inline Duct) — inside container, no roof pen needed

## Budget: $2,000-$4,000 per fan installed (fan + curb + damper)
## Made in: Schofield, Wisconsin (AMERICAN)
